evals.name: basic-test-question
evals.prompt: How do I write a unit test for a function that adds two numbers?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend using a testing framework and show example assertions

assertions.text: Mentions a testing framework by name (jest, vitest, mocha, etc.)
Shows an example test with expect/assert statements

evals.name: edge-case-testing
evals.prompt: What edge cases should I test for a string reversal function?
evals.expected_output: Should mention empty string, single character, unicode, and palindromes

assertions.text: Mentions testing with an empty string
Mentions unicode or special characters as edge cases
